title: cephaelis tomentosa
intro: Cephaelis tomentosa, also known as Ehrlichia or Ehrlichia herb, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Cephaelis tomentosa has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
